title: An Account of Abu Muslim 's Murder and the Reason for It
description: Reason for It According to Ahmad b. Zuhayr92-`Ali b. Muhammad-Salamah b. Muharib,93 also Muslim b. al-Mughirah,94 Said b. Aws,95 Abu Hafs al-Azdi,96 al-Nu`man Abu al-Sari,97 Muhriz b. Ibrahim, 98 9o. `Abdallah b. `All's eventual arrest and detention are detailed under the year 139. 9r. For other accounts, see Fragmenta historicorum, I, 219; Khalifah b. Khayyit, Ta'rikh, II, 441; Ya`qubi, Historiae, II, 439; and Azdi, Ta'rikh al-Mawsil, 137. 92. Abu Bakr Ahmad b. Abi Khaythamah Zuhayr b. Harb al-Nasa'i (d.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
